zh.lifeSummary: 當Anyll de Venables於大約1364年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables35歲，母親Margery Cotton30歲。她於1386年與William Brereton在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anyll de Venables于大约1364年出生在英国爾金德頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables35岁，母亲Margery Cotton30岁。她于1386年与William Brereton在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年在英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Anyll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anyll de Venables was born about 1364, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 35 and her mother, Margery Cotton, was 30. She married William Brereton in 1386, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1442, in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anyll de Venables est née environ 1364, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery Cotton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Brereton en 1386, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1442, à Brereton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

Sie hat 1386 in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom William Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Lei sposato William Brereton nel 1386, nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1442, nel Brereton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anyll de Venablesが約1364年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは35歳，母Margery Cottonは30歳であった。1386年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーでWilliam Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anyll de Venables(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Cotton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 William Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Brereton em 1386, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anyll de Venables родилась около 1364 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Cotton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brereton в 1386 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1442 г. в местности бриретон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con William Brereton en 1386, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1442, en Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
